user_goal: B025 US Quality Momentum Satellite — 把 Master Portfolio 的 satellite_us_quality sleeve 从 stub 升级为 implemented_strategy，对应 5 因子美股个股策略。本批次 6 features：(F001) data/fixtures/us_quality_momentum/ 30-50 ticker + ≥10 年价格 + 基本面 + 行业 + 财报日 fixture + Repository loader + 流动性过滤；(F002) 5 因子计算 momentum_12_1 + quality_score (ROE+gm+FCF-debt) + low_vol (60/120/252) + value (PE/PB/EV-EBITDA/FCF Yield/Earnings Yield) + trend (MA200/MA50 slope) + rank 标准化；(F003) 综合评分 0.35 mom+0.30 quality+0.15 lowvol+0.10 value+0.10 trend + Top 15 等权 + 单股 ≤7% + 行业 ≤30% + 财报前 5d 不新开仓；(F004) Master Portfolio satellite_us_quality stub→implemented + ≥10y backtest + 双语 Markdown 报告 + 4-sleeve Master 回测；(F005) workbench UI 全栈双语展示 (/strategies, /recommendations, /risk, /reports 5 路由) 继承 B024 i18n + Playwright zh+en；(F006) Codex L1+L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff + framework v0.9.27 候选 3 条。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 B012/B021/B022/B023/B024：** no broker SDK / no live / no paper / no AI / fixture-mock first / Repository pattern / Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD / 同源 /api/* / auth-gated / no-execution-buttons (含 B024 中文禁词) / Order ticket Markdown 双语 disclaimer 永存。数据策略：纯 fixture / mock (synthetic data, not actual filings)。因子权重：strategy doc §7 完整版 35/30/15/10/10。股票池：S&P 500 + Nasdaq 100 30-50 ticker 子集跨 ≥7 GICS sector。Top 15 等权 + 月度信号 + Master quarterly cadence。HK-China satellite 留 B026 候选。F001-F005 generator，F006 codex。预估 3-4 周。
evaluator_feedback: 2026-05-25 B025 F006 signoff PASS. Production `/api/health.version` matched `main` at `abaaf6e6a162d0ce73305e71ec1c29b54512da5f` during final verification. From deployed product SHA `afa154d` to `abaaf6e`, git diff contained only metadata/test artifacts (`progress.json`, `.auto-memory/project-status.md`, blocker report), so prior full L1 remained valid; round-4 reran focused local smoke on current HEAD with `bash scripts/test/codex-setup.sh` and `tests/e2e/b025-us-quality-bilingual.spec.ts` = 14/14 passed. L2 production checks PASSed: zh-CN+en `/strategies`, `/recommendations`, `/risk`, `/reports`, `/reports/[slug]` all rendered correctly; `/api/debug/recent-errors` returned `200 {"count":0,"records":[]}`; locale-switch focused repro passed 3/3 and persisted to `/risk`. Signoff report: docs/test-reports/B025-us-quality-signoff-2026-05-25.md.
generator_handoff: 2026-05-25 fix-round 4 仅 deploy 补部署。Codex round-3 复验 L1+L2 全过，唯一阻塞是 production version=afa154d 但 main 已前进到 f45ac46 (我的 round-3 状态机 chore) + efc9be5 (Codex 的 blocker 报告)，hash 不等价。本轮策略：**先把状态机推到位 (this commit)，再立即 dispatch deploy 让 production 落在最终 SHA**，避免又一轮 race。本 commit 推送后 → `gh workflow run "Workbench Deploy" -r main` → 等 deploy 绿 → 验证 /api/health.version == this commit SHA。**给 Codex 提示**：1) Production HEAD 这次会等于本 chore commit 的 SHA；如果你 pull 后看到 main 又前进（比如你写 signoff 的 commit），可以自己 `gh workflow run "Workbench Deploy" -r main` 再 dispatch（workflow_dispatch 在 afa154d 已上线）；2) 框架层潜在 race：每轮 fixing→reverifying 都需要 chore commit，每次 chore 后 production 都会落后一个 commit。建议 framework 后续考虑加 `docs-only-deploy` workflow 或在 done 阶段 Codex 主动 dispatch deploy。本轮我先按 ad-hoc 解；如果需要永久解，单开 batch 加 framework v0.9.27 候选。round-1/2/3 详见 commit b15661c / 0b61dda / afa154d 的 message。

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-25 B024 done 收尾后启动 B025 US Quality Momentum Satellite。(1) 用户确认 3 个关键决策：范围=全栈 (strategy+backtest+Master+UI) / 数据=纯 fixture mock / 因子=strategy doc §7 完整版 35/30/15/10/10。(2) 用户接受 6-feature 拆解：F001 fixture+universe+filter / F002 5 因子计算 / F003 综合评分+选股+约束 / F004 Master 接入+backtest / F005 workbench UI 双语 / F006 Codex L1+L2 签收。(3) HK-China satellite 留 B026 候选（BL-B011-S2 拆分剩余部分），其他 low backlog 项不变。(4) Spec 落地 docs/specs/B025-us-quality-momentum-satellite-spec.md (11 章节，含决策矩阵+永久硬边界+技术架构+feature 拆分+YAGNI+门槛汇总+参考+风险+边界+后续批次)。(5) features.json + progress.json + backlog.json 已同步更新。(6) status: done → building（含 5 个 generator features + 1 codex feature，按混合批次跳过 new/planning 直接 building）。(7) 下一会话 Generator (myId 未配置 .agent-id, 用默认映射) 起 F001，从 fixture 设计开始。关键注意点：① fixture 必须 deterministic + synthetic 明示 + point-in-time（report_date ≥ fiscal_quarter_end + 30d, earnings_date ≤ report_date）；② sklearn 仅允许 ranking 工具函数，禁止 fit/predict（safety regression 新增 grep）；③ Master Portfolio satellite_us_quality 改动精准 1 处，其他 3 sleeve（momentum / risk_parity / satellite_hk_china）完全不动；④ B011 既有测试 test_master_portfolio_config.py satellite_us_quality stub 断言要在 F004 同步改为 implemented 断言；⑤ workbench UI 继承 B024 i18n + 中文按钮禁词 + Markdown 双语 disclaimer；⑥ 回测报告基准对比落 deterministic 范围（年化 [5%,25%], Sharpe [0.3,1.5], MDD<50%）不强求达成 strategy doc §3 实盘目标（fixture 是合成数据）。
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-25 fix-round 1 完成 commit b15661c，状态从 fixing → reverifying。Codex 首轮 L1 blocker 报告：docs/test-reports/B025-us-quality-blocker-2026-05-25.md。**修复 1：独立 /risk 路由**：workbench/frontend/src/app/(protected)/risk/page.tsx（RiskBanner + 双语 context card），nav-items.ts 加 NavKey 'risk' + ShieldAlert 图标 + nav-risk testid，messages/{zh-CN,en}.json 加 nav.risk 标签 + risk.page.* 嵌套 namespace（title/subtitle/contextTitle/explainMaster/explainKillSwitch/explainPerSleeve/sleeveNote）。messages-key-parity 仍通过。**修复 2：Playwright 双 locale 套件**：tests/e2e/b025-us-quality-bilingual.spec.ts 14 个新断言覆盖 zh-CN + en × 5 spec 路由（/strategies 高亮 + 5 因子标签 / /recommendations target_positions + risk-banner 每 sleeve 行 / /risk 页头 + sleeve note / /reports 列表 / /reports/[slug] 双语 disclaimer）+ locale 切换 NEXT_LOCALE cookie 持久；playwright.config.ts authed project testMatch 加入新 spec 文件；docs/test-reports/B025-us-quality-momentum-backtest-{2024-12-31→2026-05-25}.{md,json} 重命名让报告进入 top-50 列表窗口。**完整本地验证**：Playwright 33 passed（19 baseline + 14 B025 新增，超过 ≥29 acceptance 要求），pytest 727 trade + 241 backend + 2 skipped，vitest 157 frontend，mypy strict 62 trade + 120 backend 清，ruff 清，npm lint/typecheck/build 绿，npm audit high 0。CI run 26391437378 (Workbench Frontend CI) success；Python CI + Backend CI 因 paths-ignore/paths 过滤本次未触发（仅前端 + docs 改动），与既有 path-filter 规则一致。F005 原始 generator notes 见 commit 51bf829 message。**给 Codex F006 复验提示**：1) 跑 `Playwright ≥29` 现在 33 真实通过；2) /risk 现在是真实 app route，不再仅嵌入；3) docs/test-reports/B025-us-quality-momentum-backtest-2026-05-25.md 在 top-50 listing 内可见；4) reports/us_quality_momentum/2024-12-31.{json,md} 仍保留作为原始 backtest 输出；5) 其余 L2 流程（VM smoke + 10 PNG 截图 + signoff 报告 + framework v0.9.27 候选 3 条）按 F005 末次 handoff 继续。
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-25 B025 F006 final signoff on HEAD `abaaf6e` completed. fix-round-4 resolved the last blocker by redeploying production to the current main SHA before final evaluation. `curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health` returned version `abaaf6e6a162d0ce73305e71ec1c29b54512da5f`, matching `git rev-parse HEAD`. There were no product-code changes between deployed product SHA `afa154d` and verification SHA `abaaf6e`; diff contained only metadata/test artifacts, so prior full L1 remained valid. Round-4 reran focused local smoke on current HEAD: local stack booted with backend version `abaaf6e`, and `tests/e2e/b025-us-quality-bilingual.spec.ts` passed 14/14. L2 production checks PASSed in both locales for `/strategies`, `/recommendations`, `/risk`, `/reports`, `/reports/[slug]`; `/api/debug/recent-errors` returned `200 {"count":0,"records":[]}`; locale-switch focused repro passed 3/3 with `NEXT_LOCALE=en` persisting to `/risk`. Wrote signoff report `docs/test-reports/B025-us-quality-signoff-2026-05-25.md`; batch is ready for done.
